================================== FAILURES ===================================
________ test_keyframe_uses_turn_metadata_and_keeps_tool_pairs_atomic _________

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_keyframe_uses_turn_metadata_and_keeps_tool_pairs_atomic():
        engine = CompressionEngine()
        messages = [
            {"role": "user", "content": "old low value chat"},
            {"role": "assistant", "content": "generic reply"},
            {"role": "user", "content": "请修改 core/engine.py 并运行测试"},
            {
                "role": "tool",
                "tool_call_id": "call_orphan",
                "name": "execute_bash",
                "content": "orphan should be removed",
            },
            {
                "role": "assistant",
                "content": "",
                "tool_calls": [tool_call("call_edit", "edit_file")],
            },
            {
                "role": "tool",
                "tool_call_id": "call_edit",
                "name": "edit_file",
                "content": "成功修改 core/engine.py",
            },
            {
                "role": "assistant",
                "content": "pytest tests/test_engine.py FAILED\nTraceback: AssertionError in tests/test_engine.py",
            },
            {"role": "assistant", "content": "final recent status"},
        ]
    
        result = await engine.compress(
            messages=messages,
            strategy=CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME,
            target_ratio=0.25,
            min_keep=2,
        )
    
        assert result.success
        assert result.strategy == CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME
>       assert messages[3] in result.compressed_messages
E       AssertionError: assert {'role': 'tool', 'tool_call_id': 'call_orphan', 'name': 'execute_bash', 'content': 'orphan should be removed'} in [{'role': 'user', 'content': '\u8bf7\u4fee\u6539 core/engine.py \u5e76\u8fd0\u884c\u6d4b\u8bd5'}, {'role': 'assistant', 'content': '', 'tool_calls': [{'id': 'call_edit', 'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'edit_file', 'arguments': '{}'}}]}, {'role': 'tool', 'tool_call_id': 'call_edit', 'name': 'edit_file', 'content': '\u6210\u529f\u4fee\u6539 core/engine.py'}, {'role': 'assistant', 'content': 'pytest tests/test_engine.py FAILED\nTraceback: AssertionError in tests/test_engine.py'}, {'role': 'assistant', 'content': 'final recent status'}]
E        +  where [{'role': 'user', 'content': '\u8bf7\u4fee\u6539 core/engine.py \u5e76\u8fd0\u884c\u6d4b\u8bd5'}, {'role': 'assista...
